$description: Ant Design (v5) flavor — a full DTCG override of the webtheme platform default capturing Ant's default seed/map token roles in oklch. Overrides only the roles Ant names; every other family inherits the platform default via `extends`. Values transcribe Ant Design 5's default light theme seed tokens (the `theme.defaultConfig` / algorithm output: colorPrimary #1677ff, borderRadius 6px, colorBorder #d9d9d9, colorBgLayout #f5f5f5 …) — see the paired gap list report for what these roles CAN and CANNOT reach in a rendered FUI component.

color.$description: Ant's core seed/map color roles. Ant ships a generated 10-step palette per hue plus flat semantic seed tokens (colorPrimary, colorBgContainer, colorText …); each is transcribed here onto the closest platform-default color role. Ant's alpha-on-black text roles (colorText = rgba(0,0,0,0.88), colorTextSecondary = 0.65) are pre-composited over white. The `*Bg`/on-color pairings and the filled color-scale steps Ant ships have no platform-default home — recorded in the gap list.

text-light.$description: Ant colorText rgba(0,0,0,0.88) composited over white.

accent.$description: Ant colorPrimary #1677ff — the daybreak-blue primary that distinguishes Ant from a near-black or indigo default.

text-secondary.$description: Ant colorTextSecondary rgba(0,0,0,0.65) composited over white.

radius.$description: Ant keys radius off a single `borderRadius: 6` seed; borderRadiusLG (8), borderRadiusSM (4), and borderRadiusOuter are derived from it by the algorithm.

ring.$description: Ant's focus/active affordance. Ant draws a `controlOutline` box-shadow (rgba(5,145,255,0.1), controlOutlineWidth 2px) plus a colorPrimaryBorder edge on focus; the platform-default `ring` role (#1316) is the closest home.

surface.$description: Ant's neutral surface roles (colorBorder #d9d9d9, colorBorderSecondary, colorBgLayout #f5f5f5, colorTextTertiary). colorBgLayout is Ant's muted app background; colorTextTertiary is its muted foreground.

input.$description: Ant control border (colorBorder, shared with the field outline in the default theme).
